---
name: Bug report
about: Something in Casa is broken or behaving wrong
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## What you expected

What should have happened instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Command you ran (for example `/casa-start`, `/casa-build`, or a `node scripts/...` call)
2. What Casa did
3. Where it went wrong

## Environment

- Casa version or commit:
- Node version (`node --version`):
- Claude Code version:
- OS:

## Relevant state (optional)

If the bug involves the engine, the relevant lines of `company-brain/state.json`,
`build-map.json`, or `NOW.md` help a lot. Redact anything private; never paste
secrets.
